creator: mi@kot.ne.mediaone.net
text:
mi@rtfm:ports/devel/linuxthreads (1169) make
	===>  Extracting for linuxthreads-0.71
	>> No checksum recorded for linuxthreads.tar.gz.
	Make sure the Makefile and md5 file (/usr/ports/devel/linuxthreads/files/md5)
	are up to date.  If you want to override this check, type
	"make NO_CHECKSUM=yes [other args]".
	[...]
	mi@rtfm:ports/devel/linuxthreads (1170) cat files/md5 
	MD5 (glibc-linuxthreads-2.1.2.tar.gz) = 970fde93031f342358ad16d3d6ab46fe

	The Makefile does not mention glibc and the MASTER_SITE does not have it,
	neither do the FreeBSD mirrors (ftp and ftp7).

	mi@rtfm:ports/devel/linuxthreads (1171) md5 /usr/ports/distfiles/linuxthreads*
	MD5 (/usr/ports/distfiles/linuxthreads-0.7.1.tar.gz) = 78d552da5758630b998142309810eb87
	MD5 (/usr/ports/distfiles/linuxthreads.tar.gz) = 78d552da5758630b998142309810eb87

How-To-Repeat: 
	cd /usr/port/devel/linuxthreads
	make
